label: Official 1936 (HOI-leaning curated politics)
description: Third official curated-politics scenario for the 1936-01-01 start date. Interwar ownership with elevated Europe / East Asia theaters, contested areas (Rhineland story, Sudeten claims, Danzig corridor, Ethiopian invasion), and colonial/mandate politics as curated tables. Geometry remains the modern Natural Earth scaffold unless paired with a period-geometry pack (see multi-era packs). Recommended profile hoi-like. Not Paradox-grade completeness.

UNK.notes: Scaffold residual where no rule applies

country_rules.notes: Italian invasion ongoing 1935–36; owner residual ETH, controller ITA scaffold

region_rules.notes: Rhineland — German owned; DMZ story via geometry hints
East Prussia residual on modern Warmia scaffold
Pomerania; Danzig corridor story simplified under POL with GER claims
Sudetenland still Czech in 1936; GER claims

notes: M16 official era program. Interwar majors, contested areas, and colonial/mandate tables on modern admin geometry. Pair with we-1936-v1 for Western Europe period geometry. Run gpm qa scenario --scenario official-1936 (golden auto-discovered).
